title: stelis millenaria
intro: Stelis millenaria, also known as the yellow orchid or wild orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis millenaria include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Stelis millenaria can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to the skin for its medicinal benefits.
